testcase.name: Markdown Renderer - Basic Features > FR-002: Headers Rendering > should render H1 headers correctly
Markdown Renderer - Basic Features > FR-002: Headers Rendering > should render H2 headers correctly
Markdown Renderer - Basic Features > FR-002: Headers Rendering > should render H3 headers correctly
Markdown Renderer - Basic Features > FR-002: Headers Rendering > should render multiple headers in hierarchy
Markdown Renderer - Basic Features > FR-003: Text Formatting > should render bold text
Markdown Renderer - Basic Features > FR-003: Text Formatting > should render italic text
Markdown Renderer - Basic Features > FR-003: Text Formatting > should render inline code
Markdown Renderer - Basic Features > FR-003: Text Formatting > should handle combined formatting
Markdown Renderer - Preserve Special Content > FR-009: @Mention Preservation > should render mentions as clickable buttons
Markdown Renderer - Preserve Special Content > FR-009: @Mention Preservation > should trigger onMentionClick when mention is clicked
Markdown Renderer - Preserve Special Content > FR-009: @Mention Preservation > should handle multiple mentions
Markdown Renderer - Preserve Special Content > FR-009: @Mention Preservation > should preserve mentions in markdown context

failure.message:
expect(received).toBeInTheDocument()
received value must be an HTMLElement or an SVGElement.

testcase.failure:
Error: expect(received).toBeInTheDocument()
received value must be an HTMLElement or an SVGElement.
❯ src/tests/unit/markdown-renderer.test.tsx:223:23

testcase.name: Markdown Renderer - Preserve Special Content > FR-009: @Mention Preservation > should handle mentions with underscores and hyphens
Markdown Renderer - Preserve Special Content > FR-010: #Hashtag Preservation > should render hashtags as clickable buttons
Markdown Renderer - Preserve Special Content > FR-010: #Hashtag Preservation > should trigger onHashtagClick when hashtag is clicked
Markdown Renderer - Preserve Special Content > FR-010: #Hashtag Preservation > should handle multiple hashtags
Markdown Renderer - Preserve Special Content > FR-010: #Hashtag Preservation > should NOT treat markdown headers as hashtags (CRITICAL)

testcase.name: Markdown Renderer - Preserve Special Content > FR-011: URL Preservation and Link Previews > should render URLs as clickable links
Markdown Renderer - Preserve Special Content > FR-011: URL Preservation and Link Previews > should generate link previews for URLs
Markdown Renderer - Preserve Special Content > FR-011: URL Preservation and Link Previews > should disable link previews when enableLinkPreviews is false
Markdown Renderer - Preserve Special Content > FR-011: URL Preservation and Link Previews > should handle multiple URLs with multiple previews
Markdown Renderer - Preserve Special Content > FR-011: URL Preservation and Link Previews > should handle URLs with query parameters
Markdown Renderer - Preserve Special Content > FR-011: URL Preservation and Link Previews > should handle URLs with fragments
Markdown Renderer - Security > XSS Prevention > should sanitize script tags
Markdown Renderer - Security > XSS Prevention > should sanitize javascript: URLs
Markdown Renderer - Security > XSS Prevention > should sanitize onerror attributes
Markdown Renderer - Security > XSS Prevention > should allow safe markdown elements
Markdown Renderer - Integration Tests > Combined Markdown and Special Content > should handle markdown + mentions + hashtags + URLs in same post

testcase.name: Markdown Renderer - Integration Tests > Edge Cases > should handle empty content
Markdown Renderer - Integration Tests > Edge Cases > should handle content with only whitespace
Markdown Renderer - Integration Tests > Edge Cases > should handle malformed markdown gracefully
Markdown Renderer - Integration Tests > Edge Cases > should handle very long content efficiently
Markdown Renderer - Integration Tests > Edge Cases > should handle many mentions efficiently
Markdown Renderer - Behavior Verification > Collaboration: Mentions and Click Handlers > should verify mention button triggers correct handler with correct arguments
Markdown Renderer - Behavior Verification > Collaboration: Mentions and Click Handlers > should verify multiple mention clicks trigger handler independently
Markdown Renderer - Behavior Verification > Collaboration: Hashtags and Click Handlers > should verify hashtag button triggers correct handler with correct arguments
Markdown Renderer - Behavior Verification > Collaboration: Link Preview Generation > should verify URL extraction triggers link preview rendering
Markdown Renderer - Behavior Verification > Collaboration: Link Preview Generation > should verify link preview respects enableLinkPreviews flag
Markdown Renderer - Styling > should apply custom className to container
Markdown Renderer - Styling > should apply markdown-content class to markdown section
